mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dish ( name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser} )
mapper.update: UPDATE dish SET name = #{name}, category_id = #{categoryId}, price = #{price}, image = #{image}, description = #{description}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.name, d.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, d.price, d.image, d.description, d.status, d.update_time AS updateTime FROM dish d INNER JOIN category c ON d.category_id = c.id
AND d.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND d.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY d.update_time DESC

SELECT id, name, category_id AS categoryId, price, image, description, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, create_user AS createUser, update_user AS updateUser FROM dish WHERE id = #{id}
